en.extract:
Sclater's whistler (Pachycephala soror) or the hill golden whistler, is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae found in the highlands of New Guinea.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.
The name commemorates the British zoologist Philip Lutley Sclater.


Subspecies
Four subspecies are recognized:

P. s. soror – Sclater, 1874: found in north-western New Guinea
P. s. klossi – Ogilvie-Grant, 1915: found in central and eastern New Guinea
P. s. octogenarii – Diamond, 1985: found in the Kumawa Mountains of western New Guinea
P. s. bartoni – Ogilvie-Grant, 1915: found in south-eastern New Guinea and Goodenough Island


References

'''Sclater's whistler''' ('''''Pachycephala soror''''') or the '''hill golden whistler''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Pachycephalidae]] found in the highlands of [[New Guinea]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

The name commemorates the British zoologist [[Philip Lutley Sclater]].<ref>{{cite book|last=Beolens|first=Bo|title=Whose Bird? Men and Women Commemorated in the Common Names of Birds|year=2003|publisher=Christopher Helm|location=London|page=304|author2=Watkins, Michael }}</ref>

==Subspecies==
Four [[subspecies]] are recognized:<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/whistlers/|title=Whiteheads, sitellas & whistlers « IOC World Bird List|website=www.worldbirdnames.org|language=en-US|access-date=2017-02-02}}</ref>
* ''P. s. soror'' – <small>[[Philip Sclater|Sclater]], 1874</small>: found in north-western New Guinea
* ''P. s. klossi'' – <small>[[William Robert Ogilvie-Grant|Ogilvie-Grant]], 1915</small>: found in central and eastern New Guinea
* ''P. s. octogenarii'' – <small>[[Jared Diamond|Diamond]], 1985</small>: found in the [[Kumawa Mountains]] of western New Guinea
* ''P. s. bartoni'' – <small>Ogilvie-Grant, 1915</small>: found in south-eastern New Guinea and [[Goodenough Island]]

zh.extract:
黑领啸鹟（学名：Pachycephala soror），是啸鹟科啸鹟属的一种，分布于印度尼西亚和巴布亚新几内亚。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
黑领啸鹟的平均体重约为24.8克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带或热带严重退化的前森林和亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。
